error_signature: True/False split always goes to True Path
title: True/False split always evaluates to True
symptom: The True/False split in workflows consistently directs to the True path regardless of the intended condition.
applies_when: Using a True/False split in workflows
root_cause: The issue arises when the formula used in the True/False split returns string representations of boolean values ('true' or 'false') instead of actual boolean types (true or false). This leads to the split always evaluating to True since non-empty strings are truthy in JavaScript.
fix_steps: Edit the formula used in the True/False split
Remove the quotes around true and false
agent_instruction: Update the formula to return boolean values instead of strings.
